evidence: This movie handles death and relationships in a way that is so tender...
It's like Star Trek but with sex and Cosmopolitans.
A bit of a muddle in the middle but divine in the end.
Killing off characters that are so pivotal, coming up with plots which speak of universal human truths...
This movie pulls you in and grips you...but slowly.
The cinematography, the sequencing, the actors; all brilliant.
The entire cast is excellent, the writing superb...
Martin Scorcese hit it out of the park on this one.
The story is hauntingly real and poignant.
It is beautiful. You could shut the sound off and still have enough to be seduced by.
I will think about this movie for a very long time, and come back to it when I need inspiration.
This movie is beautifully made... I can honestly say this movie is a perfect example of how great and brilliant a movie can be.

summary: The user has a strong preference for emotionally resonant dramas and romances, often appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They enjoy slow-paced storytelling that evokes deep feelings and are particularly loyal to the works of Martin Scorsese.
